name: Software Warranty and Defect Liability
text: The Developer warrants that: (a) the Software shall substantially conform to the agreed specifications and requirements for a period of ninety (90) days from the date of acceptance ('Warranty Period'); (b) the Software shall be free from material defects in design, code, and functionality; (c) the Software shall not contain any malicious code, virus, or undisclosed back-door; and (d) the Developer has the full right and authority to develop and deliver the Software and the delivery shall not infringe any third-party intellectual property rights. During the Warranty Period, the Developer shall remedy any defect or non-conformity at no additional cost to the Client. After expiry of the Warranty Period, maintenance and support shall be subject to a separate agreement. Nothing in this clause shall limit the Developer's liability for wilful misconduct or fraud.
invalid_if: Remedy mechanism for defects is not specified
